ab: i Maywan tu ngalad kan ngidralri. tu walrak dra Pinuyumayan.
ch: 我的好朋友叫 Maywan，他也是卑南族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Maywan, and he is also an Pinuyuma child.

ab: mukasa mi temakesi kana drekalr i Puyuma.
ch: 我們一起在普悠瑪部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Puyuma tribe.

ab: marayas mi mukasa kilrangaw dra maaidrangan benabati dra batibatiyan. sayaiguan mi temarapuyuma.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說卑南語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Puyuma proficiently.

ab: asatr ku aw ulane ku. adare aw idriidriwan i Maywan.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Maywan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Maywan is short and thin.

ab: salikesik i Maywan. sagar a trau peniya kantaw.
ch: Maywan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Maywan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
